name: Tin Plate Special from Fred Goslin
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and cover with cold water to soak overnight. The next day, drain the beans (discard the soaking water), then bring them to a boil and cook for 1 hour before draining.
2. In a large Dutch oven or roaster, brown the beef roast in shortening. Add the green peppers and onions and cook until tender. Stir in the beans and remaining ingredients. Cover and bake at 350°F for 2–3 hours, or until the beans are tender and the meat is cooked through.
